sources.title: Propuesta de enmiendas de AEDAF al Proyecto de Ley Organica de IA

key_facts: Expediente 121/000096 = Proyecto de Ley Organica para el buen uso y la gobernanza de la inteligencia artificial (LOIA), XV Legislatura, author: Gobierno.
Consejo de Ministros approved remission to Congress on 26 May 2026; formally presented 28 May 2026; qualified (calificado) 8 June 2026.
Published in BOCG-15-A-97-1 on 12 June 2026, opening the amendment (enmiendas) phase.
Assigned to the Comision de Economia, Comercio y Transformacion Digital.
Original amendment deadline (plazo de enmiendas): 30 June 2026 at 18:00.
Official Congreso amendment-deadline table updated 7 July 2026 shows the deadline extended to 2 September 2026 (02-09-2026) for expediente 121/000096.
As of 7 July 2026 the amendment window was still OPEN; the period to file an enmienda a la totalidad had not closed.
No BOCG-15-A-97-2 (enmiendas a la totalidad publication) for this bill was found as of the research date.
The bill follows the normal procedure (NOT procedimiento de urgencia) and lacks competencia legislativa plena, so a full plenary (Pleno) vote is required.
The bill establishes administrative fines up to 35 million euros, a public-sector AI inventory, sandbox governance, and prohibitions on certain AI techniques; adapts EU Regulation 2024/1689 (AI Act).
Professional bodies (e.g., AEDAF) had already prepared proposed amendments before the deadline.
No debate de totalidad, ponencia, commission dictamen, or plenary vote had occurred as of early July 2026.

data_points.metric: Maximum administrative fine under the bill
Date qualified (calificado) by Mesa del Congreso
Enmiendas a la totalidad published for 121/000096 as of research date
